beta.headline: Game engines, Perforce & Swarm reviews — now in beta

highlights.title: Game engines, built in
highlights.body: Launch Unity, Unreal, or a custom engine straight from any chat. PopBot auto-detects the project in each slot and gives every agent a one-click Run-Editor button — all three engines configurable side by side.

highlights.title: Perforce & Helix Core
highlights.body: First-class Perforce alongside Git — move-aware file status, and huge game depots handled by warm VHDX workspaces that spin up a slot from a terabyte-scale tree in seconds.

highlights.title: Helix Swarm reviews
highlights.body: Review Swarm changelists the way you already review GitHub PRs — pinned into your Reviews inbox, each opened in its own repoless agent chat.

highlights.title: Windows & Linux
highlights.body: PopBot now runs natively on Windows and Linux, not just macOS — signed installers for all three platforms.
